prompt:
A simple wooden backyard birdhouse with a small round entrance hole and a sloped roof, shown cleanly against a soft outdoor background. The wood grain and basic construction are clearly visible, conveying a small shelter for birds without any decorative logos or text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a grounded near-future backyard craft aesthetic: soft natural lighting, gentle bokeh, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the birdhouse centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as an icon.
